description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather slippers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair of slippers and leave behind your fashionable impression wherever you go.UpperWide leather strap covering the forefoot and midfoot for absolute comfort and styleVelcro closure on the midfoot to offer a customised FitHeavily padded leather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU textured outsole with raised semi-circular lugs and nubs for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guardshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
